application_id.description: Id of the application this rejection record belongs to. Rejection details exist only for rejected applications; there is one record per rejected application.

rejected_by_id.description: Id of the user who rejected the application. `null` for system-initiated rejections such as auto-rejection workflows.

rejection_note_id.description: Id of the note created on the application capturing the free-text rejection message, or `null` when no note was entered. The note body itself is not returned here — fetch it through `/v3/notes/{id}`.

rejection_reason_id.description: Id of the rejection reason selected for the application. References a `/v3/rejection_reasons` row scoped to the organization. `null` when the application was rejected without a reason.

rejected_at.description: Timestamp the application was rejected, in ISO 8601. `null` only for legacy or partially backfilled rejection records.

description: Schema for the 'rejection_details' stream, linked to the '/v3/rejection_details' endpoint.
